programme.title: Iron Man 2
programme.desc: With the world now aware that he is Iron Man, billionaire inventor Tony Stark (Robert Downey Jr.) faces pressure from all sides to share his technology with the military. He is reluctant to divulge the secrets of his armored suit, fearing the information will fall into the wrong hands. With Pepper Potts (Gwyneth Paltrow) and "Rhodey" Rhodes (Don Cheadle) by his side, Tony must forge new alliances and confront a powerful new enemy.

programme.title: Iron Man 3
programme.desc: Plagued with worry and insomnia since saving New York from destruction, Tony Stark (Robert Downey Jr.), now, is more dependent on the suits that give him his Iron Man persona -- so much so that every aspect of his life is affected, including his relationship with Pepper (Gwyneth Paltrow). After a malevolent enemy known as the Mandarin (Ben Kingsley) reduces his personal world to rubble, Tony must rely solely on instinct and ingenuity to avenge his losses and protect the people he loves.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) walked away from the agency that trained him to become a deadly weapon. Hoping to draw him out of the shadows, CIA director Robert Dewey assigns hacker and counterinsurgency expert Heather Lee to find him. Lee suspects that former operative Nicky Parsons is also looking for him. As she begins tracking the duo, Bourne finds himself back in action battling a sinister network that utilizes terror and technology to maintain unchecked power.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley
programme.desc: In the 1940s New York, down-on-his-luck Stanton Carlisle endears himself to a clairvoyant and her mentalist husband at a traveling carnival. Using newly acquired knowledge, Carlisle crafts a golden ticket to success by swindling the elite and wealthy. Hoping for a big score, he soon hatches a scheme to con a dangerous tycoon with help from a mysterious psychologist who might be his most formidable opponent yet.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle is here & it is a once-in-a-lifetime coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, adventurous Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the book's pages and into the physical world, he soon learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible. However, when the power of unlimited imagination falls into the wrong hands, it will take all of his creativity to save both the real world and his own.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Ice Age
programme.desc: Twenty-thousand years ago, Earth was a wondrous, prehistoric world filled with great danger, not the least of which is the beginning of the Ice Age. To avoid a terrible frostbite, the planet's majestic creatures - and a few small, slothful ones - begin migrating south. The story revolves around sub-zero heroes: a woolly mammoth, a saber-toothed tiger, a sloth and a prehistoric combination of a squirrel and rat, known as Scrat.

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: With global warming threatening their once-icy domain with widespread flooding, Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) set out to find a safe haven. Along the way, another mammoth (Queen Latifah), who thinks she is an opossum, joins the travelers on their perilous quest.

programme.title: Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Rough-and-tumble hockey player Derek Thompson (Dwayne Johnson) is a terror on the ice, earning the nickname "Tooth Fairy" by separating opposing players from their choppers. When Derek dashes the dreams of a young fan, he is quickly sentenced to serve time as a real tooth fairy, complete with wings and magic wand. Though he can't "handle the tooth" at first, Derek's new job helps him to slowly rediscover the dreams that he gave up long ago.

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb
programme.desc: When the exhibits at New York's Natural History Museum start behaving strangely, Larry Daley (Ben Stiller) -- now the director of nighttime operations -- must find out the cause. He learns that the Tablet, which magically brings Teddy Roosevelt (Robin Williams), Jedediah (Owen Wilson) and the other exhibits to life at night, has started to decay. Larry, along with his son and museum friends, must travel to London's British Museum to learn how to prevent the Tablet's magic from disappearing.

programme.title: Life's Funniest Moments
programme.desc: A boy teaches his dad how to rollerblade; a dog spins a man in a chair; a boy plays a violin and hula-hoops; a bird won't stay off a man's head.

programme.title: Jim Morrison's Final Chapter
programme.desc: Explore the life of Jim Morrison, the Doors frontman, and uncover the enigmatic details surrounding his untimely death in Paris at age 27.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: The Outlaw Country King
Elvis Presley: Shook Up
programme.desc: Behind the glitz and glamour of rock 'n' roll royalty is the haunting tale of Elvis Presley; many question his moral fiber and notorious violent temper; devilish charm dressed in angelic white had friends and fans fooled for too long.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Brittany wants to find out why her boyfriend, Taylor, has become distant.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Kesha wants to find out what's going on with Duke.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Lizet wants to know the truth about Nick.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Nicholas is worried about his relationship with Ava.

programme.title: BKB 54: Mayhem in Manchester
programme.desc: Featuring Rolando Dy vs. Paulie Malignaggi, plus Javon Wright vs. Dan Gittens in bare-knuckle boxing action from Manchester, England.

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Ella has been bullied out of her university after her peers discovered she was an award-winning porn star, and Akonne is a sports science student and a stripper who doesn't consider himself to be a sex worker.

programme.title: The Women That Made Elvis
programme.desc: Taking a look at the women who influenced Elvis Presley's life, from his mother, Gladys, to his true love, Priscilla.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Allie falls for a handsome pilot who lives in her building. But when he disappears Allie is left heartbroken until he shows up again. Dorian goes on a date with a girl who has a Jekyll and Hyde-like personality.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: In 1995, Tanya was on a double date driving through the mountains; the boys hunt down an elk and leave the girls stranded in the Utah wilderness; 19-year-old Sam dates a much older army veteran with a dark past and an insatiable sexual appetite.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: People who think their significant other is cheating on them hire a hidden camera crew to investigate their suspicions.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Nicki Parsons fears her husband-to-be has developed a case of cold feet.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia lives it up in LA; Berto mixes things up with the dancers in New Orleans; Tootie snaps when she hears Freedia is bonding with the new dancers deep in the swamps of Louisiana.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: It's Mardi Gras in New Orleans and Freedia has finally earned a coveted spot in the main parade, but a visit by a mysterious voodoo priest unsettles her as she hears shocking predictions about her future.

programme.title: The Beatles: In the Life
programme.desc: The Beatles took the world by storm in the 1960s and are still the best-selling band of all time with 183 million sales worldwide.

programme.title: Killing John Lennon
programme.desc: A dramatic step-by-step breakdown behind the lead up to John Lennon's murder on Dec. 8, 1980.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: The Outlaw Country King
Cheaters
programme.desc: Nadia Freeman discovers the reason behind her boyfriend's unbalanced behavior.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Nia Deon learns her boyfriend has a wife.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Asia Jones worries her boyfriend is getting too much attention from a lady bartender.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Byron Tut is betrayed by his girlfriend and his best friend.

programme.title: Another Christmas
programme.desc: Kelly Brooks has given up on finding love during the holiday season until her childhood friend returns home for Christmas to win her heart.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog on a beach goes around on his bottom; Molly dancing; Sandy and her sandbox.

programme.title: Life's Funniest Moments
programme.desc: Little girl breaks bowling ball, lazy dog plays keyboard, down the chair twice, man in tie plays world's smallest harmonica, amazing pool shot, photographer hit on sidelines.

programme.title: Life's Funniest Moments
programme.desc: Dance around the bottle, snake scares little girl, man on stilt falls down, dirt track driving.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Cat chasing Hot Wheel car; bulldog hates cars; dog runs and runs around bush.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Anything goes with the comedic moments celebrating funny pets and people.

programme.title: Stevie Nicks: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: For decades, Stevie Nicks has fronted one of the most successful bands in history, resurrecting them from the ashes; even with the trials and tribulations of being a member of Fleetwood Mac, Stevie has remained a role model.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a successful Wall Street investor is murdered in his home, Shaw and Riley dig into his professional and personal lives to identify his killer; DA Baxter puts pressure on Price and Maroun to make sure his first case in office is a success.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an assault at gunpoint is witnessed through a neighboring window, the squad scrambles to locate the victim to confirm she's safe; a threat to extort the victim's family leads to a shocking suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson investigates a string of sexual assaults targeting local female psychiatrists; the squad celebrates a promotion.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires go on a mission to New Hampshire to retrieve Nandor, who has lost his mind.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Laszlo's father's ghost returns to make amends; Nadja and Nandor deal with the shapeshifters who have moved in next door.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Laszlo and Nandor try to exorcise the demon who had possessed their neighbor Sean.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Colin and Nadja have a couples' night with an old friend, while Nandor and Laszlo battle the film crew that have invaded their neighborhood.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires go on a mission to New Hampshire to retrieve Nandor, who has lost his mind.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Laszlo's father's ghost returns to make amends; Nadja and Nandor deal with the shapeshifters who have moved in next door.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Laszlo and Nandor try to exorcise the demon who had possessed their neighbor Sean.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Donovan ́s ex, a recovering addict, wakes up with blood on her hands and a dead roommate in her apartment, the team moves quickly, finding there ́s more to the story.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a car accident leads Charlie and Rex to investigate reports of a strange blue light in the sky, they discover the truth is more science than fiction.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex have a run-in with a wanted criminal, when his past catches up with him.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex investigate a hot case under cold conditions when a figure skating coach is found dead.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a murder at the shipping container port, Charlie and Rex partner with a Border Security officer to track down the mastermind behind a smuggling ring.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex pull apart the secrets of a local band when their lead singer is found dead on the beach.

programme.desc: Charlie and Rex have a run-in with a wanted criminal, when his past catches up with him.

programme.desc: When a successful Wall Street investor is murdered in his home, Shaw and Riley dig into his professional and personal lives to identify his killer; DA Baxter puts pressure on Price and Maroun to make sure his first case in office is a success.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a successful Wall Street investor is murdered in his home, Shaw and Riley dig into his professional and personal lives to identify his killer; DA Baxter puts pressure on Price and Maroun to make sure his first case in office is a success.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Shaw and Riley investigate the death of a comic after a subway altercation; when a suspect is arrested, Baxter insists they increase the charges despite Price's apprehension; at trial, a new witness comes forward to throw the case into question.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson investigates a string of sexual assaults targeting local female psychiatrists; the squad celebrates a promotion.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A girl is shot and Cosgrove teams with Detective Jalen Shaw to track down her killer; Benson and Stabler assist and realize it's more than a typical homicide; McCoy and Price seek justice against an international crime ring; part 2 of 3.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Anna and Aaron are wedding photographers who have decided to go tiny in order to move their Denver business to warmer climates to maximize clientele year round.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Amber and Tommy are looking to build their first home, and they've decided going tiny is exactly the way they want to do it, keeping the beach theme of the surrounding Santa Barbara area in mind.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Tim and Amber are looking to build a tiny house designed to allow their daughter Penny's imagination to run wild. They want a space that is both functional and safe for their bright toddler.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Stacy and Jose want a tiny house that they can call home and watch their two young daughters grow up in.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Michelle and Blake love having their friends over for drinks and some card playing; they've asked John and Zack to help build them a tiny house that not only has space to entertain their friends, but room to keep their two dogs entertained as well.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: The Grahams are looking for a craftsman-style tiny house which needs to both hold up against the brutal winters they will soon face, and pack enough functionality for the whole family.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Tim and Amber are looking to build a tiny house designed to allow their daughter Penny's imagination to run wild. They want a space that is both functional and safe for their bright toddler.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Michelle and Blake love having their friends over for drinks and some card playing; they've asked John and Zack to help build them a tiny house that not only has space to entertain their friends, but room to keep their two dogs entertained as well.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: The Grahams are looking for a craftsman-style tiny house which needs to both hold up against the brutal winters they will soon face, and pack enough functionality for the whole family.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Vince and Sam work hard and play harder. They love to rock climb and go hiking with their dog; they want a tiny house that fits their fun-loving lifestyle. But Sam is a medical student so she needs her own quiet study space too.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Jake's latest mountain lion chase leads him to an angry bear; Tom and Jack take on a commission to build an ancient atlatl; Jason builds a steel trap to keep the area's wild hogs in check; Kidd transforms a large wooden boat into a summer cabin.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Freak ATV crash plunges Kidd and Harry into free fall; Jake goes on ranch patrol to protect newborn calves; Nancy gives Tom the surprise of a lifetime; Josh attempts to wrangle a feral horse.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Josh goes panning for gold in a quest to unearth the West's greatest treasure; Eustace fights to save his land, but must say goodbye to an old friend; Jason returns to the forge, putting his injured hand to the test.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Josh hits the jackpot; Tom puts his handmade dugout canoe to the test; Jake makes his last stand against a massive predator; Eustace sees his dream of keeping his new land go up in flames; Kidd and Harry secure their future in the mountains.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: As the spring melt sweeps the mountains, Jake sets his sights on bagging a black bear for the larder; Eustace and Raleigh race against time and weather to plant crops; Mike sets out to harvest a bounty from the Gulf of Alaska.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jennifer must package and transport a model ship that took 10 years to construct; Jarrett loads a crate of priceless dinosaur fossils.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc's big rig is sidelined for repairs; Chris transports a boat by sea, but his attractive shipmates prove to be a distraction.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Chris and Robbie convert one of their rigs to run on vegetable oil; Roy hopes to lure his son into the transport business.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The presence of a bride-to-be messes up Chris and Robbie's carefully planned one-day run; Jarrett teams up with Roy to deliver a load.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc plans to pepper a friend's run with pranks; the strange owner of a cold, creepy load joins Jennifer on her delivery.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc transports young partygoers to New Orleans for Mardi Gras; Jarrett learns that mixing business and pleasure can be costly.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy tries to repair a Linotype machine that he suspects he damaged during transit; Jarrett comes up with a brilliant plan after he breaks down while hauling a load.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy transports giant animatronic hillbillies and a side load of cat caskets; Jennifer moves an antique Honda.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc moves 4 million bees, then gets stung when his cargo starts to flee; a dollhouse collection is transported.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett transports a mobile tavern and a side load of sod; Jenn's trailer has a difficult time with a large load of arcade games.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Robbie tries to prove a point by taking charge of a manly shipment; Jennifer picks up an interesting travel companion while hauling expensive mannequins through the heartland.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy travels to Austin, Texas, to pick up a very large sculpture from an art collective; Jarrett's uncle helps him transport a flight simulator.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jennifer transports live bugs across the country; Marc and his daughter haul a number of Volkswagen buses.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Chris and Robbie encounter alien life-forms at a "Star Trek" convention; Jarrett tries to learn from experience when he hauls a load of large pumpkins.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Roy clashes with two customers when he hauls their goods to a Renaissance fair; the future of bicycling is entrusted to Jenn.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth confronts Nathan about his parenting style; Bill is offered a judgeship, but is unsure if he wants to take it; Rosemary hosts a girls-only night; Faith and Carson's romance blooms; Jesse finds surface oil, but can't afford to drill.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Gowen strikes oil, which splits Hope Valley into the haves and have-nots; Bill must settle a dispute among landowners; Nathan urges Bill to re-examine the judgeship offer; Rosemary must come clean to Lee about a deep, emotional anxiety she feels.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Trying to stay on Elizabeth's good side, Lucas sets up a library for the town; Allie tricks Harper, Robert and Opal into believing the town has a haunted house; Bill conducts his first trial as a judge in Hope Valley when Jesse sues Gowen.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Lucas' past comes back to haunt him and others in Hope Valley; Lee and Gowen compete for workers; an old friend arrives with a new orphan.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Ingalls of Wisconsin make a new life on the Kansas frontier.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Mary are concerned that other students won't accept them on their first day of school; Nellie Oleson snubs them for their homespun dresses.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy debates what to do when she receives money from an unexpected source; Lisa's racing plans are in jeopardy after an accident; Tim worries when Jessica is hiding something; Lou makes a big decision.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: After another "Miracle Girl" moment, Amy reconsiders her role at the Youth Centre; Jack misses Lisa, especially after Tim and Jessica are forced to move into the house.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A dying woman tries to reconcile with her stern father for the sake of her illegitimate daughter.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan's guidance helps the romance of a quadriplegic lawyer (James Troesh) and Mark's cousin (Margie Impert).

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: After a hailstorm devastates his crops, Charles learns of blasting work available in a faraway quarry.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Ingalls of Wisconsin make a new life on the Kansas frontier.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Mary are concerned that other students won't accept them on their first day of school; Nellie Oleson snubs them for their homespun dresses.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Charles brings an old friend home to dinner, Caroline decides the man would be a perfect match for Widow Snider.

programme.title: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: While hosting a puppy party, a woman tries to convince an uptight executive to give in to his daughter's pleas to adopt a rescue dog.

programme.title: Advice to Love By
programme.desc: When a love advice author and a dating columnist cross paths, attraction blooms into more. Using strategies from their own playbooks, it's possible they've met their match: each other.

programme.title: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A girl sets her single father up with her teacher after starting a matchmaking business for a school project.

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: Claire, the owner of a new restaurant, is too busy to focus on relationships. Her mother decides to fix this by finding Claire the perfect man -- without telling Claire.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: At the Founders' Day Festival, Elizabeth makes a move that might affect her future; an orphan struggles to accept his new life; Bill finds startling information about Gowen.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Lucas gives Elizabeth writing advice that causes her to search for new inspiration; Rosemary and Lee plan a vacation; Faith returns home with a dilemma that may force her to part ways with Carson.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth helps Nathan navigate family tensions when his estranged father arrives in town after recently being released from jail.

programme.title: Frozen
programme.desc: When their kingdom becomes trapped in perpetual winter, fearless Anna (Kristen Bell) joins forces with mountaineer Kristoff (Jonathan Groff) and his reindeer sidekick to find Anna's sister, Snow Queen Elsa (Idina Menzel), and break her icy spell. Although their epic journey leads them to encounters with mystical trolls, a comedic snowman (Josh Gad), harsh conditions, and magic at every turn, Anna

programme.title: Frozen II
programme.desc: Elsa the Snow Queen has an extraordinary gift -- the power to create ice and snow. But no matter how happy she is to be surrounded by the people of Arendelle, Elsa finds herself strangely unsettled. After hearing a mysterious voice call out to her, Elsa travels to the enchanted forests and dark seas beyond her kingdom -- an adventure that soon turns into a journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Inspiring stories of miracles and answered prayers from around the world.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl claims to like men who aren't afraid to cry, but when Jim bursts into tears after a movie, she is surprised to find herself turned off by his sensitivity.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Cheryl cooks for Dana and her boyfriend, she lets him believe that Dana actually did the cooking.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl offers to let Dana wear her wedding dress, unaware that the gown was destroyed in a fiery sports celebration years earlier.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: An attractive woman's suggestion leads Jim to grow a mustache, much to the dismay of Cheryl, who retaliates by coloring her hair.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: The premature birth of the Matthews' baby brings everyone together, but increases tension between Cory and Topanga.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: The rich father of a bride-to-be offers Cory $1 million to marry his daughter; Eric wants to adopt Tommy.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Just as Mr. Feeny gets enough courage to ask out Dean Bolander, her ex-husband returns to win her back.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory and Topanga's agreement to tell everyone everything creates tension at Rachel and Jack's dinner party.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Amazing stories of people who have experienced God's blessings.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Highlighting current events and stories that will help bring encouragement to people.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Taking an interest in health and safety, Cheryl sets new rules that cause Jim to feel stifled.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl and Jim's evening alone turns into an all-out food fight; Andy plots revenge on Jim for coaxing his children to play pranks on him.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim struggles to care for the kids and household while Cheryl is away, but several sympathetic neighborhood moms lend him a hand.

programme.title: The Jungle Book
programme.desc: Raised by a family of wolves since birth, Mowgli (Neel Sethi) must leave the only home he's ever known when the fearsome tiger Shere Khan (Idris Elba) unleashes his mighty roar. Guided by a no-nonsense panther (Ben Kingsley) and a free-spirited bear (Bill Murray), the young boy meets an array of jungle animals, including a slithery python and a smooth-talking ape. Along the way, Mowgli learns valu

programme.title: Aladdin
programme.desc: Aladdin is a lovable street urchin who meets Princess Jasmine, the beautiful daughter of the sultan of Agrabah. While visiting her exotic palace, Aladdin stumbles upon a magic oil lamp that unleashes a powerful, wisecracking, larger-than-life genie. As Aladdin and the genie start to become friends, they must soon embark on a dangerous mission to stop the evil sorcerer Jafar from overthrowing young

programme.title: Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: A woman and her son enlist a motley crew of so-called spiritual experts to help rid their home of supernatural squatters.

programme.title: Jungle Cruise
programme.desc: Dr. Lily Houghton enlists the aid of wisecracking skipper Frank Wolff to take her down the Amazon in his ramshackle boat. Together, they search for an ancient tree that holds the power to heal -- a discovery that will change the future of medicine.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Sgt. Olivia Benson is investigated by Internal Affairs after William Lewis' death; as pressure mounts, Olivia has to choose between her convictions and her badge.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Murphy question a television producer when he is accused of molesting his daughter; Benson strives to discover the truth as accusations fly in the media.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Taking an active approach to catching sex offenders, the team targets a photographer with a secret life whose fantasies may have crossed into reality.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro must face the consequence of his reckless behavior; when an online ad for escorts leads to the rape and robbery of tourists, Benson discovers she has a connection to one of the suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson struggles to balance work and her new role of foster mother; when Amaro arrests a young prostitute with connections to Noah's mother, his undercover work sets off a dangerous chain of events.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a series of allegations are made against a superstar basketball player, Sgt. Benson and Detective Carisi (Peter Scanavino) do not agree on the authenticity of each woman's story; the investigation takes Rollins back to her former precinct.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro's by-the-book handling of a starlet's arrest gets him back on the SVU squad in time to investigate the actress's latest offense, statutory rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team tries to find a bike messenger -- who has kept a video diary of his troubles with women -- before he can commit another violent act; the new deputy chief calls Benson's leadership into question.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A college student becomes a target after her work as an online porn star is discovered by her classmates.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Car accident? Free Legal Consultation
programme.desc: Legal professionals standing by to answer your questions.

programme.title: CSN Mint - America 250 Coin Roll Collection!
programme.desc: CSN Mint presents 1776-2026 U.S. Mint coin roll offers honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including the Emerging Liberty Dime, Enduring Liberty Half Dollar, and P&D Quarter Roll Continuity.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: When the head swim coach of a community college is found dead at the bottom of the well, possible suspects think he may have been having an affair; a new intern (Laura Spencer) catches Sweets' attention.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A man who wanted to talk to Booth about a possible government cover-up is killed before their meeting takes place; as Booth and the team investigate the conspiracy surrounding the man's death, Booth's future with the FBI becomes uncertain.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: As Brennan and the team try to absolve Booth and get him out of prison, the remains of a man who has been dead for 16 years prove to be significant; Booth encounters criminals he was responsible for incarcerating.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: The team works with Special Agent Aubrey to investigate a far-reaching conspiracy in the government; DNA found on a previous victim linked to the scandal helps the narrow down the suspect pool.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: With intern Rodolfo's help, the team investigates the murder of a conservative radio host whose remains were found in a storm drain; Special Agent Aubrey endeavors to gain Booth's trust; Brennan worries about Booth's mental health.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a Muslim college student and his younger brother are murdered, the team connects with the outraged imam of OA's former mosque, who insists the victims were wrongly targeted as terrorists.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team investigates an extremist gun group after an anti-gun lobbyist building is bombed; SAC Bashar dangles a possible promotion for OA.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team realize they have a cross-country serial killer on their hands; the case has ties to Isobel's father, Robert, and his hotel, leading to revelations about their fractured relationship.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an immigration agent is fatally shot at a hockey game, the team attempts to find the shooter, who they believe may also be targeting Congressman Curtis Grange, who was at the same game.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a young couple is found murdered in a New York City park after returning from a vacation, the team searches for a suspect linked to the drug trade; Scola turns over a new leaf when it comes to his relationships.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: OA is forced to confront one of his biggest fears when the team discovers that deadly sarin gas may have been sold to terrorists.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a morning show host is murdered inside her home, the team tracks the killer; things become awkward for Scola when agent Nina Chase becomes part of the team during Maggie's recovery.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A killer is using drug mules to exploit airport security checkpoints; OA struggles to cope with the aftermath of the sarin gas exposure and the 10th anniversary of his army friend's death in Afghanistan.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a retired Drug Enforcement Administration agent is shot outside a bakery, the team works to determine if the victim's past cases or current bouncer job are connected to the murder; Nina and Tiffany clash over the use of an informant.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team pivots when their sting operation to secure a massive bomb from an illegal broker leads them to discover that the device is already in the wrong hands; Jubal's promise to be present at his son's birthday party is put to the test.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate the murder of a bride; Jane's new neighbor captures the attention of Angela, Frankie and Frost.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and Frankie work hard to solve the murder of someone who grew up with them; Jane and Maura must decide when to reveal the truth about Lydia's pregnancy to Angela.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A statue breaks open to reveal a dead woman inside; the squad gets a new homicide detective; Dennis Rockmond returns to Boston and tries to woo Maura; Lydia goes into labor.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and the team try to find the contamination source after a man dies from poisoning; Stanley's true feelings are revealed; Tommy and Lydia disagree about custody of their baby; Detective Korsak reunites with his ex-wife.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A famous author's suicide might not be all that it seems; Frost reviews an old murder case; Jane discovers Angela's new romance.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The virtual world and the real world collide when a microbrewer is killed; Angela starts seeing someone new; Jane and the team mentor underprivileged teenagers.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A statue breaks open to reveal a dead woman inside; the squad gets a new homicide detective; Dennis Rockmond returns to Boston and tries to woo Maura; Lydia goes into labor.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and the team try to find the contamination source after a man dies from poisoning; Stanley's true feelings are revealed; Tommy and Lydia disagree about custody of their baby; Detective Korsak reunites with his ex-wife.

programme.desc: A famous author's suicide might not be all that it seems; Frost reviews an old murder case; Jane discovers Angela's new romance.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; based on the belief that the Bible is the written and inspired Word of God, the show is meant to invoke change in the lives of people across the globe; Creflo and his wife, Taffi, share their vision for everyone to hear the Word and gain understan

programme.title: Life Today
programme.desc: James Robison was a former preacher who changed directions in his life and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people. This daily religious and self-help program welcomes guests who tell how they have successfully overcome difficulties in their lives by following God's word -- with the hope of encouraging others to do the same and look t

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Noted for her humanitarian ministry efforts to aid suffering people around the world, Bible teacher Joyce Meyer reaches out to both Christians and non-Christians as she illustrates how to make each day better by applying biblical principles to every activity.

programme.title: The Balancing Act
programme.desc: Special edition of The Balancing Act.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: The wedding day has arrived, but Brenda and Fritz are a bit preoccupied with work; someone may be leaving the squad.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Brenda's squad investigates a quadruple murder that may be linked to an FBI case.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: The squad investigates the kidnapping of a rich financier who is under investigation for ripping off investors.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The team goes on a city-wide hunt for an individual who is threatening to cause a mass casualty event; Tim's sister shows up unannounced with some surprising news; Lopez continues her inner struggle over Wesley's deal with Elijah.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Desperate to break free from his connection to Elijah, Wesley tries to plant a listening device in his office to incriminate him; Officer Bradford and his sister, Genny, learn an unsettling truth about their father.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Now that John Nolan knows about Bailey's past, he must decide if they still have a future; when a plane crashes in the middle of the city, the team races to find out why.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Alexis asks Castle for help proving a death row inmate's innocence 72 hours before his execution, but they uncover a secret that could seal the man's fate.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a well-known relationship therapist is murdered, it seems that she was targeted due to the secrets she knew about her powerful and elite clients.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a woman who looks very similar to Lanie is murdered, the team thinks the killer may be targeting members of the 12th precinct.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when the body of an NCIS facilities manager is found four months after she went missing; as the team faces mandatory psych evaluations, Gibbs is concerned about Abby's recurring nightmares.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky orders the exhumation of a body from a 12-year-old case; the team investigates a Marine's death.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a helicopter crew's training mission ends in a disastrous crash, the NCIS team must figure out what happened and find the missing pilot; Ziva challenges McGee and Tony to a dare.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a petty officer is shot in a billionaire's car, the investigation leads the team to Gibbs' namesake.
